lemmas.conclusion: count n xs = count n (sort xs)
lemmas.statement: count n xs = count n (sort xs)

lemmas.body: (if n = x then count n xs + 1 else count n xs) = if n = x then count n (sort xs) + 1 else count n (sort xs)
lemmas.conclusion: count n (x :: xs) = count n (sort (x :: xs))
lemmas.statement: (h1 : (if n = x then count n xs + 1 else count n xs) = if n = x then count n (sort xs) + 1 else count n (sort xs)) : count n (x :: xs) = count n (sort (x :: xs))
